title: Day 31 of Middle East conflict – Trump again threatens to blow up Iran's energy sources
snippet: President Donald Trump said the US may blow up and completely obliterate Iran's electric plants and oil wells if a deal to end the war is not reached

title: US may seize Kharg Island as Iran greenlights 20 oil ships through Strait of Hormuz
snippet: Trump wrote: The United States is in serious discussions with A NEW, AND MORE REASONABLE, REGIME. Great progress has been made but if a deal is not shortly reached we will conclude by blowing up all Electric Generating Plants, Oil Wells and Kharg Island

title: Iran War Live Updates: Kuwaiti Tanker Full of Oil Struck Off Dubai Day After Trump's Threats
snippet: Trump said the US made great progress in discussions with a new regime and a deal would probably be shortly reached

title: Trump says U.S. will destroy Iran's oil wells, Kharg Island without deal to reopen Hormuz Strait
snippet: Trump on Truth Social: The United States is in serious discussions with A NEW, AND MORE REASONABLE, REGIME to end our Military Operations in Iran

title: Trump Claims Iran Gave In to US Demands, Considers Seizing Oil
snippet: Trump said Iran gave the US most of the 15 demands it issued to Tehran to end the war, even as it remains unclear whether either side is negotiating

title: Stock futures rise as oil prices fall after report says Trump looking to end Iran war
snippet: S&P 500 rose 0.8%, Nasdaq 100 futures added 0.7%, Dow Jones futures gained 394 points after WSJ report Trump told aides he wanted to end Iran war

title: Trump Amps Up His Mixed Iran War Messaging Evening Briefing Americas
snippet: Trump's reversals accelerated Monday amid the widening war. The president oscillated between threats of further destruction of Iran's civilian infrastructure and unconfirmed claims of peace negotiations

title: Brent Crude Surges Above 115 Dow Futures Slide Trump says Favorite Thing To Do Would Be Take The Oil
snippet: Dow futures fell 249 points, S&P 500 futures declined 0.52% to 6379. Brent crude above 115

title: Who Struck It Rich in the Markets When Trump Postponed Bombing Iran
snippet: On March 23rd at 6:49AM EST, roughly six thousand oil-trading contracts worth more than half a billion dollars changed hands just before Trump signals

title: Dow Jones leads markets higher as Trump says Iran talks serious
snippet: Dow Jones S&P 500 and Nasdaq futures up around 0.6% after a week of heavy selling left all three indices nursing losses of 2.8% to 4.5%

title: Stock Market Today Dow S&P Live Updates March 31
snippet: Equity-index futures climbed 0.8% and oil prices fell on optimism an end to the conflict may be near

title: Pakistan announces US-Iran talks in coming days
snippet: Negotiations with the country are still ongoing directly and indirectly and a deal could come through soon

title: S&P 500 closes lower Monday as oil prices continue climb
snippet: Dow tumbles almost 800 points and enters correction S&P 500 posts fifth straight losing week

title: EPIC FURY UPDATE Trump wants Iran deal within 10 days Leavitt says
snippet: White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt holds briefing on Operation Epic Fury progress in Iran Day 31

title: Trump reportedly wants to take the oil in Iran as Tehran targets water power facilities in Kuwait
snippet: Trump claimed Iran agreed to most of the 15 points proposed by the US for a peace deal. They gave us most of the points

title: Live updates Trump renews threat to Iran's power plants as war sends oil prices soaring again
snippet: Trump said his administration was negotiating with A NEW AND MORE REASONABLE REGIME in Iran
